name: Emoji Autocomplete

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/KraXen72/obsidian-emoji-autocomplete/compare/v1.4.1...1.5.2
> 1.5.2: hotfix due to incorrect git tags.
> 1.5.1's changelog/message below:

Hello! This plugin is still alive. However, don't expect too much activity, because it's basically feature-complete.

I have changed the sorting slightly to fix #12. From a bit of testing it seems to work fine. However, the change may have some unintended consequences, so please, if you notice anything sorting less conveniently than it used to, let me know by opening an issue. Thanks!

New stuff:  
- added :true: ✅ and :false: ❌ aliases/tags (+ some more)
- fix #12: bump recently used items more
- fix #13: ignore when typing russian characters
- fix #15: no teeth emoji (it's called tooth, added an alias to teeth)
- fix some types and some bugs i found
- bump dependencies
- automatic builds & releases with GitHub actions
- some more stuff I forgot.

I have tried adding tests but after two failed attempts I have left this for later.
Please report any bugs in GitHub Issues.
Thanks for using emoji-autocomplete!
\- KraXen72

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/KraXen72/obsidian-emoji-autocomplete/compare/v1.4.1...v1.5.1

Hello! This plugin is still alive. However, don't expect too much activity, because it's basically feature-complete.

I have changed the sorting slightly to fix #12. From a bit of testing it seems to work fine. However, the change may have some unintended consequences, so please, if you notice anything sorting less conveniently than it used to, let me know by opening an issue. Thanks!

New stuff:  
- added :true: ✅ and :false: ❌ aliases/tags (+ some more)
- fix #12: bump recently used items more
- fix #13: ignore when typing russian characters
- fix #15: no teeth emoji (it's called tooth, added an alias to teeth)
- fix some types and some bugs i found
- bump dependencies
- automatic builds & releases with GitHub actions
- some more stuff I forgot.

I have tried adding tests but after two failed attempts I have left this for later.
Please report any bugs in GitHub Issues.
Thanks for using emoji-autocomplete!
\- KraXen72

releases.author: KraXen72
releases.description:
Fixed master branch not allowing obsidian to install newer versions  
Fixed polyfillFlagEmoji if font is not overridden

releases.author: KraXen72
releases.description:
Improved the performance of EmojiMarkdownProcessor - related issue: https://github.com/phibr0/obsidian-emoji-shortcodes/issues/47
Improvements:
- switched to `textContent` instead of `innerText` - `innerText` only takes into account visible text, so it was creating a [forced reflow / recalculation of styles](https://web.dev/articles/avoid-large-complex-layouts-and-layout-thrashing#avoid_forced_synchronous_layouts)
- added early-return to not even execute regex if element does not include a `:`
- switched to normal `for` loops instead of `forEach` for better performance
- moved EmojiMarkdownProcessor to normal functions instead of a class with static methods
- switched to a faster `something == null` check instead of `typeof something === 'undefined'`
- embedded skiped tagnames (`CODE` and `MDX`) into if statement instead of doing an `Array.prototype.some` every time
- switched to `String.prototype.slice()` instead of 2 regex replaces to trim off the `:` from a shortcode
- removed unnecessary `typeof element.tagName === 'string'` check

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/KraXen72/obsidian-emoji-autocomplete/compare/1.3.0...1.4.0
